intro: Anil procumbens, also known as Indian valerian, is a medicinal plant species within the Valerianaceae family. The health benefits of Anil procumbens include its anxiolytic, sedative, and anticonvulsant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat anxiety disorders, insomnia, and restlessness.
